1. [create-workspace]

2. [kubebuilder-init]
   cwd: workspace/generated-operators/app-config-operator

   cwd: workspace/generated-operators/app-config-operator

5. [patch-controller-tests]

   command: patch-controller-tests workspace/generated-operators/app-config-operator AppConfig
6. [make-generate]
   cwd: workspace/generated-operators/app-config-operator
   command: make generate
7. [make-manifests]
   cwd: workspace/generated-operators/app-config-operator
   command: make manifests
8. [make-test]
   cwd: workspace/generated-operators/app-config-operator
   command: make test

recoveryPlan.rootCause: brokenValue field uses unsupported type: notatype

evidence.excerpt:
## Common Causes
- unsupported Go field type in `api/<version>/*_types.go`
Typical messages include `undefined: notatype`, `expected type`, `unknown identifier`, or Go compile errors in an API package.

proposedFixes: Change brokenValue from notatype to one of: []string, bool, boolean, float32, float64, int, int32, int64, map[string]string, metav1.Time, string.
Regenerate the operator spec, patch artifacts, then run make generate/manifests/test.

validatedRecoveryToolCalls.reason: Replace unsupported type notatype with a supported Go type.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.expectedEffect: The natural-language requirement no longer contains an unsupported field type.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.verificationStep: Review the edited requirement before regenerating the operator spec.

validatedRecoveryToolCalls.reason: Regenerate operator spec after the approved type correction.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.expectedEffect: operator-spec.yaml contains only supported field types.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.verificationStep: Inspect specFields/statusFields in the regenerated operator-spec.yaml.

validatedRecoveryToolCalls.reason: Apply the corrected API type to generated Kubebuilder artifacts.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.expectedEffect: Go API types compile with the corrected field type.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.verificationStep: Run the validation Tool after patching.

validatedRecoveryToolCalls.reason: Verify generated code, manifests, and tests after the approved correction.
validatedRecoveryToolCalls.expectedEffect: make generate, make manifests, and make test succeed.

rejectedRecoveryToolCalls.reason: Not in recovery allowlist and rerunning alone does not correct the invalid field type.

recoveryPlan.beginnerSummary: The `make generate` command failed due to an invalid Go field type in the generated API types file (`brokenconfig_types.go`). To recover, review and correct the invalid field type, then regenerate the API types using `controller-gen`. This requires approval.
